code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    subject_map = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_map:
            subject_map[triple.subject] = []
        subject_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    sentence = ""
    # Improved predicate mapping
    predicates = {
        "cityServed": lambda obj: f"which serves the city of {obj}",
        "location": lambda obj: f"located in {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda obj: f"with an elevation of {obj} metres above sea level",
        "runwayLength": lambda obj: f"and has a runway length of {obj} metres",
        "country": lambda obj: f"in the country of {obj}",
        "capital": lambda obj: f"where the capital is {obj}",
        "isPartOf": lambda obj: f"which is part of {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda obj: f"with an official language of {obj}",
        "mayor": lambda obj: f"and a mayor of {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": lambda obj: f"operated by {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": lambda obj: f"with a first runway length of {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"and a first runway surface type of {obj}",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": lambda obj: f"and a third runway length of {obj} feet",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda obj: f"with an ICAO location identifier of {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda obj: f"and a location identifier of {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda obj: f"with an elevation of {obj} feet above sea level",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda obj: f"and an IATA location identifier of {obj}",
        "nativeName": lambda obj: f"with a native name of {obj}",
        "leaderParty": lambda obj: f"and a leader party of {obj}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"and a second runway surface type of {obj}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"and a third runway surface type of {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"with a runway surface type of {obj}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"and a fifth runway surface type of {obj}",
    }
    for subject, triples_list in subject_map.items():
        if sentence:
            sentence += " which "
        sentence += f"{subject} "
        for i, (predicate, obj) in enumerate(triples_list):
            if predicate in predicates:
                sentence += predicates[predicate](obj)
            else:
                sentence += f", with a {predicate} of {obj}"
            if i < len(triples_list) - 1:
                sentence += ", "
        if len(subject_map) > 1:
            sentence += ", "
    # Try to connect related triples into a single sentence
    # Improved sentence construction for related triples
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a cityServed of", "serves the city of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a location of", "is located in")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has an elevationAboveTheSeaLevel of", "has an elevation of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a runwayLength of", "has a runway length of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a country of", "is located in the country of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a leader of", "is led by")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a mayor of", "where the mayor is")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has an operatingOrganisation of", "is operated by")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has an isPartOf of", "is part of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a nativeName of", "has a native name of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a leaderParty of", "has a leader party of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a 1stRunwayLengthFeet of", "has a first runway length of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a 1stRunwaySurfaceType of", "has a first runway surface type of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a 3rdRunwayLengthFeet of", "has a third runway length of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has an icaoLocationIdentifier of", "has an ICAO location identifier of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has a locationIdentifier of", "has a location identifier of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has an elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet of", "has an elevation of")
    sentence = sentence.replace("has an iataLocationIdentifier of", "has an IATA location identifier of")
    return sentence + "."
